summary: Energy Onshore / Offshore insurance covering oil, gas, power generation, and renewable energy assets. Covers physical damage, control of well, and operator's extra expense. Complex engineering risk with PML-based capacity management and reinsurance treaty alignment.

schemaEntities.description: Energy risk entity. Custom: AssetType, TotalInsuredValue, COPE_Data, OffshoreLatLong, WaterDepth, ProductionCapacity_BOPD, ReserveType, WellCount, ManifoldType, ProcessingFacility, HSSERecord, EnvSensitivityZone, ISO14001_Cert, AgePlatform, HSE_ConsentRequired, PML_Estimate.

148 rules: PML adequacy vs TIV, UKCS block/licence validation, HSE offshore installation consent checks, well control contractor approval, ISO 14001 environmental discount, renewable energy technology acceptance, accumulation zone concentration limits.
Individual well entity. Custom: WellRef, WellType, Depth_MD, H2S_Presence, HPHT_Flag, WellControlContractor, LastWellReport, ProductionRateRisk, ReservoirPressure, BlooutPreventerCert.
Catastrophe model reference entity. Custom: ModelName, ModelVersion, PML_1in100, PML_1in250, EML_Estimate, ScenarioName.

relationships.note: TIV and PML driven by 16 custom risk fields -- complex offshore engineering data
Control of well limit driven by individual well depth, pressure, and H2S data
PML estimate from cat model drives capacity and reinsurance trigger -- no GW Cloud equivalent
148 rules include HSE consent and UKCS licence validation -- regulatory hard stops

migrationIssues.detail: EnergyRisk_Energy has 16 custom fields for complex offshore engineering data. No GW Cloud standard energy entity -- major new entity design required.
CatModel_Energy tracks PML estimates from RMS/AIR models. No GW Cloud native cat model integration -- external catastrophe model API connector required.
WellEntity_Energy has 10 custom fields for individual well data. No GW Cloud standard well entity -- new entity design required.
HSE offshore installation consent and UKCS licence validation. No GW Cloud native HSE integration -- new regulatory API connectors required.
Solar, wind, tidal, and hydrogen technology acceptance lists. New and rapidly evolving risk class -- technology acceptance list integration required.
UKCS block-level accumulation concentration monitoring. External GIS-based accumulation engine required -- no GW Cloud native offshore accumulation support.

cloudMapping.action: RMS/AIR cat model integration for PML estimation -- major integration effort
Well entity requires new GW Cloud design -- HPHT and H2S fields critical
HSE offshore installation consent API integration required
Cat model reference entity requires new GW Cloud design -- key for capacity management
